scripts.proof:p1: npm run proof:p0 && node bin/interfacectl.js surfaces adapter proof --catalog artifacts/p0/governed-catalog.json --fixture fixtures/p1 --out artifacts/p1
scripts.proof:p2: node bin/interfacectl.js surfaces ingest proof --source sources/p2/design-system-source --fixture fixtures/p2 --out artifacts/p2
scripts.proof:p3: node bin/interfacectl.js surfaces agents proof --ingestion-evidence artifacts/p2/evidence.json --catalog artifacts/p2/governed-catalog.json --fixture fixtures/p3 --out artifacts/p3
scripts.proof:p4: node bin/interfacectl.js surfaces review proof --orchestration-evidence artifacts/p3/evidence.json --review-queue artifacts/p3/review-queue.json --fixture fixtures/p4 --out artifacts/p4
scripts.proof:p5:protocol: node bin/interfacectl.js surfaces protocol proof --ingestion-evidence artifacts/p2/evidence.json --review-evidence artifacts/p4/evidence.json --decision-ledger artifacts/p4/surfaceops-decision-ledger.json --review-report artifacts/p4/review-judgment-report.json --catalog artifacts/p2/governed-catalog.json --fixture fixtures/p5/protocol --out artifacts/p5/protocol
scripts.proof:p5:native: node bin/interfacectl.js surfaces native proof --ingestion-evidence artifacts/p2/evidence.json --review-evidence artifacts/p4/evidence.json --decision-ledger artifacts/p4/surfaceops-decision-ledger.json --review-report artifacts/p4/review-judgment-report.json --catalog artifacts/p2/governed-catalog.json --protocol-evidence artifacts/p5/protocol/evidence.json --fixture fixtures/p5/native --out artifacts/p5/native

scripts.proof:designer-workflow-trace: node bin/interfacectl.js surfaces designer-workflow-trace proof --ingestion-evidence artifacts/p2/evidence.json --catalog artifacts/p2/governed-catalog.json --ingestion-report artifacts/p2/ingestion-report.json --source-conformance-evidence artifacts/source-conformance/evidence.json --source-authority-map artifacts/source-conformance/source-authority-map.json --source-conformance-report artifacts/source-conformance/source-conformance-report.json --source-review-queue artifacts/source-conformance/source-review-queue.json --orchestration-evidence artifacts/p3/evidence.json --review-queue artifacts/p3/review-queue.json --review-evidence artifacts/p4/evidence.json --decision-ledger artifacts/p4/surfaceops-decision-ledger.json --review-report artifacts/p4/review-judgment-report.json --evaluation-report artifacts/p4/judgmentkit-evaluation-report.json --protocol-evidence artifacts/p5/protocol/evidence.json --native-evidence artifacts/p5/native/evidence.json --fixture fixtures/designer-workflow-trace --out artifacts/designer-workflow-trace
scripts.proof:surfaceops-kanban-static: node bin/interfacectl.js surfaces surfaceops-kanban-static proof --orchestration-evidence artifacts/p3/evidence.json --review-queue artifacts/p3/review-queue.json --orchestration-report artifacts/p3/agent-orchestration-report.json --review-evidence artifacts/p4/evidence.json --decision-ledger artifacts/p4/surfaceops-decision-ledger.json --review-report artifacts/p4/review-judgment-report.json --evaluation-report artifacts/p4/judgmentkit-evaluation-report.json --kanban-substrate-manifest sources/surfaceops-kanban-static/kanban-substrate-manifest.json --fixture fixtures/surfaceops-kanban-static --out artifacts/surfaceops-kanban-static
